aboutPreview.heading: The company that puts quality first
aboutPreview.description: We offer services in maintenance, electrical installation, and project management consulting. Built on responsiveness and strong leadership, we deliver results you can rely on.

response.title: Fast response

about.heading: Meet the team
about.description:
With over 40 years of combined experience in the electrical industry, Amperium Elektriska delivers quality at every step — both as installer and project manager. From small assignments to turnkey installations for major clients, the goal is always the same:
making the project a success.
about.note: Amperium was founded in 2023 by Jimmy Rittervall & Simon Kihl

services.heading: $t(common.ourServices)
services.description: With extensive experience in electrical work, we help both private individuals and businesses - quickly, safely, and with high quality in every job. <highlight>Explore our services below</highlight>

detail.ctaHeading: Contact us for a free quote

service.heading: Service and maintenance
service.description: Your electrical system can act up at any time — we're here when it does. We prioritize fast troubleshooting and repairs, and also offer preventive maintenance for those who want to stay one step ahead. For example, for properties

electrical.heading: Electrical installations
electrical.description: With extensive and solid experience in electrical installations, we're here for you — whether it's a smaller job at home or a larger project at the workplace.

project.heading: Project management consulting
project.description: Have a large project that needs reinforcement on the leadership side? Or a pile of service requests you can't keep up with? We step in. With broad experience in both large, complex projects and smaller assignments, we're here as project managers whenever you need us.

contact.heading: $t(common.contactUs)
contact.description: <highlight>Fill in the form below and we'll get back to you with a free quote</highlight> — feel free to describe what you need help with so we can prepare.
